caption: A man with a smiling expression wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "YOU NEVERD" and "SUIT" printed on it sits in front of a black professional microphone. He is located in a room decorated with numerous framed photographs on the walls and a white mannequin wearing a white garment in the background. To the right, clothing racks are partially visible. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left featuring the word "TAPE" and another on the right that reads "RED VELVET tot". As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expression shifts from a slight, closed-mouth smile to a wider, open-mouthed grin, while his head turns slightly to the right. The background setting and the placement of the microphone and logos remain constant throughout the scene.
